CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GOLDEN GATE AUTO EXP BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-08-2009 AT 10:00AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AZARY, DENNIS M. CAMPOS, VERANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEISLER, KEN KEISLER, KATE $4,366.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,516.00, PLAINTIFF'S SHALL RECONVEY THE 1999 VW PASSAT GLS WAGON TO THE DEFENDANTS WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF RECEIPT OF THE AWARD PROVIDED FOR IN THIS JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE EXP IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
